items.title: Paper 1 — Principles of Accounting
items.description: Build a rock-solid accounting foundation. FA's comprehensive course covers all aspects of Paper 1 with exclusive study material and a 10,000+ question bank. Multiple AIR holders produced every year.

items.title: Paper 2 — Business Law
items.description: Corporate law, business correspondence and regulatory frameworks — simplified with case studies and exam-focused coverage updated to the latest ICAI syllabus.

items.title: Paper 3 — Quantitative Aptitude
items.description: Business mathematics, logical reasoning and statistics — mastered step by step. Regular mock tests mirror actual exam patterns with FA's proven methodology.

items.title: Paper 4 — Business Economics
items.description: Macro and microeconomics demystified with real-world Indian case studies. Concise exam-focused summaries and concept-to-answer bridging techniques.

items.title: CA Foundation Level 1 — for Class 11
items.description: Start your CA journey from Class 11. This early-start program builds a significant head-start on the Foundation syllabus before students even complete school.

items.title: CA Foundation Level 2 — for Class 12
items.description: Full syllabus coverage with built-in revision cycles — designed for Class 12 students targeting their first-attempt Foundation pass right after school.

items.title: CA Foundation — Regular Batch
items.description: All four Foundation papers in one comprehensive batch. Structured weekly schedule, regular tests, and full FA study material included. Best suited for focused full-time preparation.

items.title: CA Foundation — Weekend Batch
items.description: The complete CA Foundation program condensed into weekend sessions — ideal for students balancing school, college or part-time work alongside their studies.

items.title: CA Intermediate — Group 1
items.description: Advanced Accounting, Corporate Laws, Cost & Management Accounting, and Taxation. FA's structured program with expert tutors ensures thorough subject mastery.

items.title: CA Intermediate — Group 2
items.description: Auditing, Financial Management, Strategic Management and Economics — covered comprehensively with dedicated practice sessions and case-based learning.

items.title: CA Inter — Paper 1: Advanced Accounting
items.description: Standalone Advanced Accounting coaching — ideal for students who need focused strengthening of this paper with dedicated problem-solving sessions.

items.title: CA Final — Group 1
items.description: Financial Reporting, Strategic Financial Management, Advanced Auditing and Professional Ethics — the final milestone of your CA journey, guided by FA's senior faculty.

items.title: CA Final — Group 2
items.description: Corporate & Economic Laws, Strategic Cost Management, Direct Tax and Indirect Tax — intensive preparation with real exam simulations and expert mentoring.

items.title: Busy: Professional
items.description: Master Busy accounting software at the professional level. Full GST, payroll, inventory and reporting — essential for accounting roles across Tamil Nadu.

items.title: Busy: Operator
items.description: Hands-on operator-level Busy training covering daily accounting operations, voucher entry, GST filing and report generation. Industry-ready on completion.

items.title: Busy: Addon Modules
items.description: Advanced Busy add-on module training for professionals who want to extend their accounting software skills with specialised features and custom configurations.

items.title: TDS Practicals
items.description: Practical, hands-on TDS deduction, filing and compliance training. Learn to prepare and file TDS returns, handle corrections and avoid common compliance pitfalls.

items.title: SAP Accounting
items.description: Introduction to SAP for finance professionals — covering basic navigation, financial accounting modules and reporting in one of the world's most widely used ERP platforms.

items.title: MS Office for Finance
items.description: Excel, Word and PowerPoint — specifically applied to finance tasks. Spreadsheet modelling, financial reporting formats and presentation skills for working professionals.

items.title: Professional Development Program
items.description: Advanced finance coaching for working professionals seeking career growth, salary upgrades or professional certification. Flexible timings, senior tutors, real-world case focus.

items.title: Custom Coaching Plans
items.description: Fully personalised learning paths built around your strengths, gaps, goals and schedule. One-on-one mentoring with senior faculty and tracked progress milestones.
